mapper.select: /** UsptBsnsIoeSetupDao.selectList */ select uwi.wct_ioe_id , uwi.wct_ioe_nm , case when ubis.bsns_cd is null then false else true end as is_checked , #{bsnsCd} as bsns_cd from uspt_wct_ioe uwi left outer join uspt_bsns_ioe_setup ubis on ubis.wct_ioe_id = uwi.wct_ioe_id and ubis.bsns_cd = #{bsnsCd}

/** UsptBsnsIoeSetupDao.selectTaxitmList */ select uwt.wct_taxitm_id , uwt.wct_taxitm_nm , case when usts.bsns_cd is null then false else true end as is_checked from uspt_wct_taxitm uwt left outer join uspt_bsns_taxitm_setup usts on usts.wct_taxitm_id = uwt.wct_taxitm_id and usts.bsns_cd = #{bsnsCd} where uwt.wct_ioe_id = #{wctIoeId} order by uwt.wct_ioe_id
